query: SELECT bl.id, bl.liverId, bl.livestreamDate, l.name, l.email FROM brand_livestreams bl LEFT JOIN livers l ON bl.liverId = l.id WHERE l.email = 'shihomi208@gmail.com' ORDER BY bl.id DESC LIMIT 5;
